query_context.source: synthetic prototype — pre-crafted high-confidence data for standalone testing

trends.cluster_summary: The Tiffany Lock bracelet has emerged as the defining couple's jewelry trend on XHS — driven not just by the product's aesthetic but by the ritual narrative around it. Posts centre on the moment of gifting, the Blue Box opening, and the symbolism of the lock mechanism. Content splits between emotional storytelling (anniversary, first gift, proposal adjacent) and practical evaluation (wear longevity, gold quality, whether it works as a self-purchase). The engagement across both content types is uniformly high, suggesting the Lock has reached cultural milestone status among 25-38 year olds in China's tier-one cities.
trends.top_post_example: Tiffany Lock手链一年使用报告——锁扣每天开合没有金属疲劳感 18K玫瑰金颜色变化极小 最重要的是每次低头看到它都会想起买它的那个时刻 这才是好珠宝的意义 #蒂芙尼 #TiffanyLock #情侣珠宝 #Tiffany #一年体验

trends.cluster_summary: A sustained and growing signal around Tiffany's T collection worn as everyday fine jewelry — specifically T Wire and T1 pieces layered together across wrists and fingers. The discourse on XHS has shifted from 'Is Tiffany worth it?' to 'How do I build a T stack?' — a significant maturation that suggests brand trust is established and the conversation has moved to styling fluency. Posts by working professionals and creatives are driving disproportionate saves, with practical guidance on metal finishes, layering logic, and transitions from casual to formal dressing the most-saved content format.
trends.top_post_example: T1戒指 + T Wire手链 + T细手链三件叠戴——T系列的线条极简 叠在一起不会显乱 反而每条的宽细形成节奏感 上班通勤都可以戴 完全不浮夸 这就是quiet jewelry的正确答案 #蒂芙尼 #Tiffany #T系列 #手链叠戴 #日常珠宝

trends.cluster_summary: A high-quality content cluster around Tiffany's exceptional stones and high jewelry archive — centred on the Blue Book collection, the Tiffany Setting's engineering, and the brand's diamond sourcing transparency. The posts are generating outsized saves from an audience that appears to be in active research mode — evaluating Tiffany against other high jewelers before a major purchase. Notable within this cluster is the sub-signal around Elsa Peretti archive pieces, with creators positioning them as overlooked design masterworks rather than heritage pieces. The Tiffany Setting as a craft argument — not just a symbol — is the most resonant narrative.
trends.top_post_example: Tiffany Setting 1886年发明的六爪镶嵌 今天仍然是钻戒设计的参照系——六个爪让光线从钻石六个方向进入和折射 最大化火彩 这不是传统 是一道工程题的正确答案 #蒂芙尼 #TiffanySetting #六爪镶嵌 #钻戒工艺 #高级珠宝
